content:
You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>/init-explore</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-07</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

=======================

  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreSDK/docs/exploration/04-learning-path.md\",\"content\":\"# OpenCoreSDK 学习路径\\n\\n本文档为 OpenCoreSDK Android coredump 抓取框架的系统学习指南，涵盖 Java API 层、JNI 桥接、Native 核心逻辑、架构抽象、信号处理、ELF Core 写入、VMA 过滤、Inject 模式及测试应用等核心模块。\\n\\n**总预计时长**：3-4 小时\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 学习步骤总览\\n\\n| 步骤 | 标题 | 核心文件 | 预计时间 |\\n|------|------|----------|----------|\\n| 1 | 项目概览与核心概念 | README.md | 15-20 分钟 |\\n| 2 | Java API 层 | Coredump.java | 25-30 分钟 |\\n| 3 | JNI 桥接层 | opencore_jni.cpp, AndroidJNI.cpp | 20-25 分钟 |\\n| 4 | Native 核心层 | opencore.h, opencore.cpp | 30-35 分钟 |\\n| 5 | 架构抽象层 | arm64/lp64/opencore.cpp | 20-25 分钟 |\\n| 6 | 信号处理与线程控制 | Thread.cpp | 20-25 分钟 |\\n| 7 | ELF Core 格式写入 | lp64/opencore.cpp | 25-30 分钟 |\\n| 8 | VMA 过滤机制 | opencore.cpp | 20-25 分钟 |\\n| 9 | Inject 模式实现 | opencore_jni.cpp | 15-20 分钟 |\\n| 10 | 测试应用分析 | MainActivity.java, native-lib.cpp | 15-20 分钟 |\\n\\n**总计**：约 3 小时 35 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 1：项目概览与核心概念\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `README.md`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- 理解 OpenCoreSDK 的整体架构：Java API -> JNI 桥接 -> Native 核心库\\n- 掌握完整使用流程：初始化 -> 配置过滤器 -> 设置保存目录 -> 启用 crash 捕获\\n- 理解 Android coredump 的核心挑战：进程暂停和内存读取\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- ptrace(PTRACE_GETREGSET) 获取寄存器状态\\n- /proc/[pid]/mem 读取进程内存\\n- 跨进程的 core dump 抓取机制\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n15-20 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 2：Java API 层（Coredump.java）\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/java/penguin/opencore/sdk/Coredump.java`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **单例模式**：通过私有构造函数和静态 getInstance() 方法实现全局唯一实例\\n- **双 Handler 架构**：\\n  - `OpencoreHandler`：处理异步 coredump 任务\\n  - `OpencorePostHandler`：处理完成后回调通知\\n- **Thread.UncaughtExceptionHandler**：JavaCrashHandler 拦截 Java 层未捕获异常\\n- **位掩码定义**：FLAG_CORE、FLAG_PID 等定义文件名规则\\n- **VMA 过滤策略**：FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA 等常量控制内存段过滤\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- HandlerThread 创建带 Looper 的后台线程，实现异步消息队列\\n- waitCore()/notifyCore() 使用 Object 的 wait/notify 实现线程同步\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n25-30 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 3：JNI 桥接层\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore_jni.cpp`\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/eajni/AndroidJNI.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **方法映射**：gMethods 表定义 14 个 native 方法的签名映射\\n- **动态注册**：RegisterNatives 比静态注册更灵活\\n- **回调机制**：callbackEvent 通过 pthread_create 创建 Java 线程执行回调\\n- **Inject 模式支持**：INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR 宏定义 LD_PRELOAD 注入模式\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- JNI RegisterNatives 用于动态注册 native 方法\\n- 构造函数符号 `__attribute__((constructor))` 允许 so 加载时自动执行初始化代码\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n20-25 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 4：Native 核心层\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.h`\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **核心抽象类**：VirtualMemoryArea 结构、ThreadRecord、FLAG/FILTER 常量、信号处理接口\\n- **内存布局解析**：ParseMaps() 解析 /proc/[pid]/maps 获取进程内存布局\\n- **VMA 过滤**：IsFilterSegment() 判断 VMA 是否需要过滤\\n- **进程控制**：StopTheWorld()/Continue() 控制目标进程所有线程\\n- **静态单例**：通过 GetInstance() 访问全局实例\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- VirtualMemoryArea 结构映射 /proc/[pid]/maps 的每一行\\n- begin-end 为地址范围，flags 为 r/w/x 权限，offset/inode/file 描述映射的物理文件\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n30-35 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 5：架构抽象层\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/arm64/opencore.cpp`\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/lp64/opencore.cpp`\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/arm64/`（其他架构特定实现）\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **策略模式**：支持多 CPU 架构（EM_ARM(40)、EM_AARCH64(183)、EM_X86_64(62)、EM_RISCV(243)）\\n- **arm64 特有实现**：\\n  - 寄存器集（pc/sp/x0-x30）\\n  - PAC/MTE 寄存器\\n  - Thread Local Storage\\n- **lp64 基类**：实现 ELF core 文件的通用写入逻辑\\n- **架构继承**：各架构通过继承获得通用能力的同时保留架构特定实现\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- PTRACE_GETREGSET 通过 iovec 结构传递不同类型的寄存器集\\n- NT_PRSTATUS、NT_FPREGSET、NT_ARM_TLS、NT_ARM_PAC_MASK 等常量\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n20-25 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 6：信号处理与线程控制\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/eajni/Thread.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **信号入口**：HandleSignal() 接收 siginfo_t 和 ucontext_raw\\n- **进程暂停**：StopTheWorld() 使用 ptrace(PTRACE_SEIZE) 暂停目标进程所有线程\\n- **线程遍历**：通过 /proc/[pid]/task 遍历所有线程\\n- **进程恢复**：Continue() 使用 PTRACE_CONT 恢复进程\\n- **原生线程创建**：Thread::androidCreateRawRawThreadEtc() 创建原生线程执行 JNI 回调\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- PTRACE_SEIZE vs PTRACE_ATTACH：SEIZE 不带停止功能但允许控制信号传递，ATTACH 会立即停止目标线程\\n- /proc/[pid]/task 列出进程内所有线程 TID\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n20-25 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 7：ELF Core 格式写入\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/lp64/opencore.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **DoCoredump 完整流程**：\\n  ```\\n  ParseProcessMapsVma -> CreateCoreHeader -> CreateCoreNoteHeader ->\\n  CreateCorePrStatus -> CreateCoreAUXV -> SpecialCoreFilter ->\\n  WriteCoreHeader -> WriteCoreNoteHeader -> WriteCoreProgramHeaders ->\\n  WriteCorePrStatus -> WriteCoreAUXV -> WriteNtFile -> WriteCoreLoadSegment\\n  ```\\n- **ELF Core 文件格式**：\\n  - ET_CORE 类型\\n  - PT_NOTE program header（NT_PRSTATUS/NT_SIGINFO/NT_AUXV/NT_FILE）\\n  - PT_LOAD program header（描述内存映射段）\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- ELF Core Note 结构：Elf64_Nhdr (n_namesz/n_descsz/n_type) + name padding + desc data\\n- NT_FILE note 包含 (begin, end, offset) 三元组描述每个映射的文件信息\\n- RoundUp() 用于 4 字节对齐\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n25-30 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 8：VMA 过滤机制\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **双重过滤**：IsFilterSegment() 和 IsSpecialFilterSegment() 共同决定 VMA 是否写入 core\\n- **8 种过滤器**：\\n  - FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA：过滤 vsyscall/vvar 等特殊映射\\n  - FILTER_FILE_VMA：过滤非 ELF 文件映射\\n  - FILTER_SHARED_VMA：过滤共享库\\n  - FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA：过滤 ASan shadow memory\\n  - FILTER_NON_READ_VMA：过滤不可读段\\n  - FILTER_SIGNAL_CONTEXT：过滤信号处理上下文\\n  - FILTER_MINIDUMP：仅保留 PC/SP 和寄存器指向的页面\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- NeedFilterFile() 通过打开映射文件检查是否为 ELF 且机器类型匹配\\n- VMA_NULL：完全过滤\\n- VMA_INCLUDE：强制包含\\n- VMA_NORMAL：正常流程\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n20-25 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 9：Inject 模式实现\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore_jni.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **LD_PRELOAD 注入**：通过预加载 libopencore.so 实现无源码注入\\n- **构造函数自动初始化**：__attribute__((constructor)) 在库加载时自动执行\\n- **初始化内容**：设置保存目录、超时时间、过滤器、启用 native crash 处理\\n- **remote hook 命令**：remote hook --inject -l libopencore.so 注入目标进程\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- LD_PRELOAD 允许在目标进程启动前注入 so\\n- 构造函数符号在 so 加载时自动执行，适合运行时注入场景\\n- destructor 在 so 卸载时执行，可用于清理资源\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n15-20 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 10：测试应用分析\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `app/src/main/java/penguin/opencore/tester/MainActivity.java`\\n- `app/src/main/cpp/native-lib.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **完整使用流程**：\\n  1. setListener() 设置完成回调\\n  2. 5 个测试按钮分别触发：\\n     - Java crash（空指针调用）\\n     - Native crash（nativeCrashJNI）\\n     - 手动 core（doCoredump）\\n     - abort 信号\\n     - OOM 测试\\n- **LeakMemory**：用于 OOM 测试的内存泄漏工具\\n- **core-parser 工具**：使用 sysroot symbols/ 加载调试符号，bt 命令显示混合堆栈\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- Android coredump 分析工具（core-parser）使用 sysroot symbols/ 加载调试符号\\n- bt 命令显示 Java 到 Native 的混合堆栈\\n- GDB 16 可完整解析 ART 虚拟机的调用链\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n15-20 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 学习建议\\n\\n### 前提条件\\n- 熟悉 Android 开发环境（Android Studio、NDK）\\n- 了解 JNI/Native 开发基本概念\\n- 具备 Linux 进程/线程基础知识\\n\\n### 学习顺序\\n1. **建议从步骤 1 开始**：先理解整体架构和设计理念\\n2. **步骤 2-3 联动**：Java API 层和 JNI 桥接层紧密配合\\n3. **步骤 4-6 深入**：Native 核心层需要较多时间理解进程控制和内存解析\\n4. **步骤 7-8 核心**：ELF Core 格式和 VMA 过滤是框架核心能力\\n5. **步骤 9-10 实践**：Inject 模式和测试应用帮助巩固理论\\n\\n### 实践建议\\n- 使用 Android Studio 配合 NDK 调试 Native 代码\\n- 通过测试应用的 5 个按钮分别验证各功能\\n- 结合 core-parser 工具分析生成的 core 文件\\n- 在真机上测试（模拟器对 ptrace 有限制）\"}"</parameters>

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>

    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>

  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreSDK/docs/exploration/04-learning-path.md\",\"content\":\"# OpenCoreSDK 学习路径\\n\\n本文档为 OpenCoreSDK Android coredump 抓取框架的系统学习指南，涵盖 Java API 层、JNI 桥接、Native 核心逻辑、架构抽象、信号处理、ELF Core 写入、VMA 过滤、Inject 模式及测试应用等核心模块。\\n\\n**总预计时长**：3-4 小时\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 学习步骤总览\\n\\n| 步骤 | 标题 | 核心文件 | 预计时间 |\\n|------|------|----------|----------|\\n| 1 | 项目概览与核心概念 | README.md | 15-20 分钟 |\\n| 2 | Java API 层 | Coredump.java | 25-30 分钟 |\\n| 3 | JNI 桥接层 | opencore_jni.cpp, AndroidJNI.cpp | 20-25 分钟 |\\n| 4 | Native 核心层 | opencore.h, opencore.cpp | 30-35 分钟 |\\n| 5 | 架构抽象层 | arm64/lp64/opencore.cpp | 20-25 分钟 |\\n| 6 | 信号处理与线程控制 | Thread.cpp | 20-25 分钟 |\\n| 7 | ELF Core 格式写入 | lp64/opencore.cpp | 25-30 分钟 |\\n| 8 | VMA 过滤机制 | opencore.cpp | 20-25 分钟 |\\n| 9 | Inject 模式实现 | opencore_jni.cpp | 15-20 分钟 |\\n| 10 | 测试应用分析 | MainActivity.java, native-lib.cpp | 15-20 分钟 |\\n\\n**总计**：约 3 小时 35 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 1：项目概览与核心概念\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `README.md`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- 理解 OpenCoreSDK 的整体架构：Java API -> JNI 桥接 -> Native 核心库\\n- 掌握完整使用流程：初始化 -> 配置过滤器 -> 设置保存目录 -> 启用 crash 捕获\\n- 理解 Android coredump 的核心挑战：进程暂停和内存读取\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- ptrace(PTRACE_GETREGSET) 获取寄存器状态\\n- /proc/[pid]/mem 读取进程内存\\n- 跨进程的 core dump 抓取机制\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n15-20 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 2：Java API 层（Coredump.java）\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/java/penguin/opencore/sdk/Coredump.java`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **单例模式**：通过私有构造函数和静态 getInstance() 方法实现全局唯一实例\\n- **双 Handler 架构**：\\n  - `OpencoreHandler`：处理异步 coredump 任务\\n  - `OpencorePostHandler`：处理完成后回调通知\\n- **Thread.UncaughtExceptionHandler**：JavaCrashHandler 拦截 Java 层未捕获异常\\n- **位掩码定义**：FLAG_CORE、FLAG_PID 等定义文件名规则\\n- **VMA 过滤策略**：FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA 等常量控制内存段过滤\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- HandlerThread 创建带 Looper 的后台线程，实现异步消息队列\\n- waitCore()/notifyCore() 使用 Object 的 wait/notify 实现线程同步\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n25-30 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 3：JNI 桥接层\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore_jni.cpp`\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/eajni/AndroidJNI.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **方法映射**：gMethods 表定义 14 个 native 方法的签名映射\\n- **动态注册**：RegisterNatives 比静态注册更灵活\\n- **回调机制**：callbackEvent 通过 pthread_create 创建 Java 线程执行回调\\n- **Inject 模式支持**：INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR 宏定义 LD_PRELOAD 注入模式\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- JNI RegisterNatives 用于动态注册 native 方法\\n- 构造函数符号 `__attribute__((constructor))` 允许 so 加载时自动执行初始化代码\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n20-25 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 4：Native 核心层\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.h`\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **核心抽象类**：VirtualMemoryArea 结构、ThreadRecord、FLAG/FILTER 常量、信号处理接口\\n- **内存布局解析**：ParseMaps() 解析 /proc/[pid]/maps 获取进程内存布局\\n- **VMA 过滤**：IsFilterSegment() 判断 VMA 是否需要过滤\\n- **进程控制**：StopTheWorld()/Continue() 控制目标进程所有线程\\n- **静态单例**：通过 GetInstance() 访问全局实例\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- VirtualMemoryArea 结构映射 /proc/[pid]/maps 的每一行\\n- begin-end 为地址范围，flags 为 r/w/x 权限，offset/inode/file 描述映射的物理文件\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n30-35 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 5：架构抽象层\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/arm64/opencore.cpp`\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/lp64/opencore.cpp`\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/arm64/`（其他架构特定实现）\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **策略模式**：支持多 CPU 架构（EM_ARM(40)、EM_AARCH64(183)、EM_X86_64(62)、EM_RISCV(243)）\\n- **arm64 特有实现**：\\n  - 寄存器集（pc/sp/x0-x30）\\n  - PAC/MTE 寄存器\\n  - Thread Local Storage\\n- **lp64 基类**：实现 ELF core 文件的通用写入逻辑\\n- **架构继承**：各架构通过继承获得通用能力的同时保留架构特定实现\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- PTRACE_GETREGSET 通过 iovec 结构传递不同类型的寄存器集\\n- NT_PRSTATUS、NT_FPREGSET、NT_ARM_TLS、NT_ARM_PAC_MASK 等常量\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n20-25 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 6：信号处理与线程控制\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/eajni/Thread.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **信号入口**：HandleSignal() 接收 siginfo_t 和 ucontext_raw\\n- **进程暂停**：StopTheWorld() 使用 ptrace(PTRACE_SEIZE) 暂停目标进程所有线程\\n- **线程遍历**：通过 /proc/[pid]/task 遍历所有线程\\n- **进程恢复**：Continue() 使用 PTRACE_CONT 恢复进程\\n- **原生线程创建**：Thread::androidCreateRawRawThreadEtc() 创建原生线程执行 JNI 回调\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- PTRACE_SEIZE vs PTRACE_ATTACH：SEIZE 不带停止功能但允许控制信号传递，ATTACH 会立即停止目标线程\\n- /proc/[pid]/task 列出进程内所有线程 TID\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n20-25 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 7：ELF Core 格式写入\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/lp64/opencore.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **DoCoredump 完整流程**：\\n  ```\\n  ParseProcessMapsVma -> CreateCoreHeader -> CreateCoreNoteHeader ->\\n  CreateCorePrStatus -> CreateCoreAUXV -> SpecialCoreFilter ->\\n  WriteCoreHeader -> WriteCoreNoteHeader -> WriteCoreProgramHeaders ->\\n  WriteCorePrStatus -> WriteCoreAUXV -> WriteNtFile -> WriteCoreLoadSegment\\n  ```\\n- **ELF Core 文件格式**：\\n  - ET_CORE 类型\\n  - PT_NOTE program header（NT_PRSTATUS/NT_SIGINFO/NT_AUXV/NT_FILE）\\n  - PT_LOAD program header（描述内存映射段）\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- ELF Core Note 结构：Elf64_Nhdr (n_namesz/n_descsz/n_type) + name padding + desc data\\n- NT_FILE note 包含 (begin, end, offset) 三元组描述每个映射的文件信息\\n- RoundUp() 用于 4 字节对齐\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n25-30 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 8：VMA 过滤机制\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **双重过滤**：IsFilterSegment() 和 IsSpecialFilterSegment() 共同决定 VMA 是否写入 core\\n- **8 种过滤器**：\\n  - FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA：过滤 vsyscall/vvar 等特殊映射\\n  - FILTER_FILE_VMA：过滤非 ELF 文件映射\\n  - FILTER_SHARED_VMA：过滤共享库\\n  - FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA：过滤 ASan shadow memory\\n  - FILTER_NON_READ_VMA：过滤不可读段\\n  - FILTER_SIGNAL_CONTEXT：过滤信号处理上下文\\n  - FILTER_MINIDUMP：仅保留 PC/SP 和寄存器指向的页面\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- NeedFilterFile() 通过打开映射文件检查是否为 ELF 且机器类型匹配\\n- VMA_NULL：完全过滤\\n- VMA_INCLUDE：强制包含\\n- VMA_NORMAL：正常流程\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n20-25 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 9：Inject 模式实现\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore_jni.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **LD_PRELOAD 注入**：通过预加载 libopencore.so 实现无源码注入\\n- **构造函数自动初始化**：__attribute__((constructor)) 在库加载时自动执行\\n- **初始化内容**：设置保存目录、超时时间、过滤器、启用 native crash 处理\\n- **remote hook 命令**：remote hook --inject -l libopencore.so 注入目标进程\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- LD_PRELOAD 允许在目标进程启动前注入 so\\n- 构造函数符号在 so 加载时自动执行，适合运行时注入场景\\n- destructor 在 so 卸载时执行，可用于清理资源\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n15-20 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 步骤 10：测试应用分析\\n\\n### 核心文件\\n- `app/src/main/java/penguin/opencore/tester/MainActivity.java`\\n- `app/src/main/cpp/native-lib.cpp`\\n\\n### 重点难点\\n- **完整使用流程**：\\n  1. setListener() 设置完成回调\\n  2. 5 个测试按钮分别触发：\\n     - Java crash（空指针调用）\\n     - Native crash（nativeCrashJNI）\\n     - 手动 core（doCoredump）\\n     - abort 信号\\n     - OOM 测试\\n- **LeakMemory**：用于 OOM 测试的内存泄漏工具\\n- **core-parser 工具**：使用 sysroot symbols/ 加载调试符号，bt 命令显示混合堆栈\\n\\n### 关键概念\\n- Android coredump 分析工具（core-parser）使用 sysroot symbols/ 加载调试符号\\n- bt 命令显示 Java 到 Native 的混合堆栈\\n- GDB 16 可完整解析 ART 虚拟机的调用链\\n\\n### 预计时间\\n15-20 分钟\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 学习建议\\n\\n### 前提条件\\n- 熟悉 Android 开发环境（Android Studio、NDK）\\n- 了解 JNI/Native 开发基本概念\\n- 具备 Linux 进程/线程基础知识\\n\\n### 学习顺序\\n1. **建议从步骤 1 开始**：先理解整体架构和设计理念\\n2. **步骤 2-3 联动**：Java API 层和 JNI 桥接层紧密配合\\n3. **步骤 4-6 深入**：Native 核心层需要较多时间理解进程控制和内存解析\\n4. **步骤 7-8 核心**：ELF Core 格式和 VMA 过滤是框架核心能力\\n5. **步骤 9-10 实践**：Inject 模式和测试应用帮助巩固理论\\n\\n### 实践建议\\n- 使用 Android Studio 配合 NDK 调试 Native 代码\\n- 通过测试应用的 5 个按钮分别验证各功能\\n- 结合 core-parser 工具分析生成的 core 文件\\n- 在真机上测试（模拟器对 ptrace 有限制）\"}"</parameters>
